titles.title: I Know I am the Bride (Liberty Version)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know I am the Bride That You're returning for Dressed in garments White and wrinkle-free.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have no earthly love That I am holding to, You're the One who means Everything to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will sing, I will worship You I will bow myself down Humbly at Your throne

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will do anything, I will give everything For You alone!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are the faithful God Who keeps Your covenant There's not one thing You've said That You haven't done

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And someday when I see You Standing face to face My praise for You Will only have begun
